modularCompletions.note: Modular and modern methods of construction (MMC) homes completed in the UK

mmcShareOfNewHomes.note: MMC completions as percentage of total new homes completed

sources.name: MHCLG
sources.dataset: Housing Supply: Net Additional Dwellings, England

metadata.methodology: MMC completions estimated from Homes England programme data, NHBC warranty registrations with MMC designation, and industry surveys. Share of total homes uses MHCLG net additional dwellings as denominator. Company collapse data compiled from Companies House filings and industry press.
knownIssues: No single official MMC definition — figures may include volumetric, panelised and hybrid systems differently
Government 25% by 2025 target was never formally funded or regulated
Collapse data may miss smaller regional operators
